## Verification status

- [ ] commands verified from official docs
- [ ] uncertain items marked `Needs verification`
- [ ] links updated
- [ ] README navigation updated if needed
- [ ] SUMMARY.md updated if new docs pages were added
- [ ] Last verified date added or refreshed

- [ ] screenshots added if UI/docs-site visual changes were made

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I used official docs where possible
- [ ] I did not invent CLI commands
- [ ] I tested links I added
- [ ] I kept examples copy-pasteable
- [ ] I added Windows/macOS/Linux/WSL notes where relevant
